title: Cash/platform bounty scout: 10 candidates rejected or held at preflight
channel: GitHub issue + fork PR + platform claim/comment

evidence.summary: NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Algora bot $30 cash/platform. Open/no assignee and payout route visible, but 10+ open PRs/attempts already implement the same generated db:generate PGlite behavior. Approval odds poor; no duplicate PR.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Algora-looking bounty label, amount not visible in issue. Open/no assignee, but multiple PRs already submitted (#86/#128/#142) and comments include prior claim. Duplicate/crowded; no implementation.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Algora-looking bounty label, amount not visible in issue. Open/no assignee, but at least two PRs (#87/#146) and several attempts exist. Scope also needs app-specific wallet/admin logic. No PR.

HOLD / HIGH_USER_INPUT — Algora $450 cash/platform. Official Algora comment requires `/attempt`, core-team assignment, contributor onboarding, and issue is reserved for SE interview. Not eligible for automatic implementation without assignment/approval.

HOLD / HIGH_USER_INPUT — Algora $400 cash/platform. Official Algora route visible, but issue is reserved for SE interview and requires core-team assignment. Broad MCP/server work; no automatic attempt.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Opire command comments, cash route unclear in issue. Open, but prerequisite/migration task has existing PRs (#70/#78/#83) and active claim comments. Approval odds poor and payout/assignment unclear.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Opire command comments, cash route unclear in issue. Open but blocked by #27, broad architectural migration, existing PRs (#71/#79/#84), and prior /opire try comments. No implementation.
NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Opire command comments, cash route unclear in issue. Open but blocked by #28 and already has multiple PRs (#54/#72/#81/#85) plus active comments. No duplicate PR.

NO-GO / HIGH_USER_INPUT — Ubiquity label Price: 400 USD. Issue comments explicitly say only core team/admin may start. Task involves external business outreach/partnership contact, outside automatic L3 scope.
NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Ubiquity/devpool label Price: 400 USD. Mirrors ubiquity/business-development#89 and has a claimant comment. External outreach + duplicate/core-team dependency; no action.

decision_history.summary: cash/platform bounty/direct-payout 후보 10개 검색 및 preflight 확인.
빠른 PR 가능 후보는 대부분 기존 PR/attempt가 과밀.
Archestra/Ubiquity 계열은 assignment·SE interview·외부 outreach 조건으로 자동 진행 불가.
중복 제출, 할당 미충족, 외부 연락/핵심팀 제한이 지급 가능성을 차단.
GO 후보 없음; 신규 기대 순수익 0.

next_action: 다음 scout는 기존 PR 과밀도가 낮고 assignment가 필요 없는 verified cash/platform micro-bounty를 우선 검색.
